summary: Dashboard Analytics Widgets Testing Complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend widgets displaying correctly with proper data. Login page dark glass design verified. Arabic text rendering correctly with IBM Plex Sans Arabic font.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard widgets implementation is clean and follows best practices
DashboardWidgets.js has proper data-testid attributes for all widgets
API responses include all required fields for widget display
Arabic translations integrated properly with isRTL prop
Progress bar component using shadcn Progress component correctly
Auditor workload chart displays visual progress bars with color coding
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard analytics widgets are fully implemented and tested. The dashboard is now the default tab when users log in. All Quick Actions buttons navigate correctly. Arabic fonts use IBM Plex Sans Arabic which renders properly. Login page has dark glassmorphism design.

Certificate Expiration Widget.details: Shows 30/60/90 day expiration counts with color coding

Quick Actions Card.details: 4 buttons: Create Form, Pending Approvals, Audit Programs, Certificates
Quick Actions Card.navigation: All buttons navigate to correct routes

Revenue Target Progress.details: Shows monthly revenue, target, progress bar percentage

Today's Activity Widget.details: Shows new forms, proposals, and recent notifications

Auditor Workload Chart.details: Displays task distribution per auditor with visual progress bars

Login Page Dark Glass Design.details: Glassmorphism effect with backdrop-blur, dark overlay, gold button

Arabic Font Rendering.font: IBM Plex Sans Arabic, Manrope, sans-serif
Arabic Font Rendering.rtl_support: Proper RTL layout with isRTL prop

/api/dashboard/stats.today_activity: new_forms and new_proposals counts plus notifications

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
